metadata.local_industries: There are just over 9,000 businesses in Cockburn, operating across various industrial sectors. Noteworthy is the standout performance in clustering of key strategic industries such as marine shipbuilding, defence support, construction, manufacturing, transport-related businesses and support industries for sea-based petroleum, oil and gas.The Cockburn economy generates an estimated $28.868 billion in output. Cockburn represents 31.7% of the $87.877 billion output generated in South West Group, 5.5% of the $503.834 billion output generated in Greater Perth, and 3.7% of the $744.109 billion output generated in Western Australia.
